chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI 1st Appeal No. 85 of 2016 _____________________________________________________ Date Order.with signature of Judge Hearing For hearing of main case 23.10.2023 Ms.Naheed A.Shahid, Advocate for Appellant......... Learned counsel for Appellant though at one point of time challenged the Judgment and Decree of Banking Court which has not granted the Decree to the extent as claimed in the memo of plaint, however, later the parties have settled it out of the Court and on instructions, learned Counsel for Appellant does not press this Appeal which is dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E J U D G E Ashraf
